hypothesis: The 'market_structure' component scores 0 in 100% of reps — dropping its weight (or treating non-zero as an anti-signal) does not reduce, and may improve, realized edge.
mechanism: A component that almost never fires adds noise to the composite score and can invert the intended ranking; zero-weighting isolates the components that actually carry signal.

hypothesis: Re-test 'USDJPY regime gate: suppress signals in bull+elevated VIX' on the canonical costed runner with an OOS holdout — the original verdict used an uncosted/misannualized backtest and was marked RETEST_BLOCKED.
mechanism: In bull markets with VIX>15, JPY safe-haven bid fights USD macro signal. Regime mismatch. Filter the cluster, keep the pair.

hypothesis: Re-test 'market_structure score is an anti-edge — mirrors HYP-024' on the canonical costed runner with an OOS holdout — the original verdict used an uncosted/misannualized backtest and was marked RETEST_BLOCKED.
mechanism: ICT scoring rewards confirmation signals that are structurally late. ms=0 trades enter during displacement before structure confirms — that is where the edge lives. ms>0 trades confirm structure has shifted, meaning the move is already committed.
